pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-004 (DQ, Skill) maps to BI Developer scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4413 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.441, eu_ai_act=0.426, nist_ai_rmf=0.424. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within business intelligence development and analytics engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4413 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DQ-S-004 (DQ, composite 0.4413) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles does not surface this DQ-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4413 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DQ domain content at composite 0.4413 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4413, domain DQ. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
